name: NutriAI
tagline: AI nutrition tracker — camera food recognition, RevenueCat subscriptions, AdMob ads, USDA database, Apple Health sync
description: Mobile app that identifies food from photos and tracks nutrition. Gemini AI multi-tier fallback for recognition. USDA FoodData Central + Open Food Facts barcode lookup for accuracy. RevenueCat in-app purchases (monthly $9.99, yearly $49.99, lifetime $99.99). AdMob ads for free tier (banner, interstitial every 5th scan, rewarded for bonus scans). Analytics with calorie trend charts and macro pie charts. HealthKit + Google Fit sync.
content_angles: Point your camera at food, get instant nutrition data
Apple Health + Google Fit sync for unified health tracking
Cross-platform React Native — one codebase, iOS + Android
